# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Bash script for deploying to AWS using the AWS CLI. The script should authenticate with AWS and perform deployment operations. Ensure the script can be used safely in both local development and CI/CD environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
IFS=$'\n\t'

log() { printf '%s %s\n' "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" "$*" >&2; }
die() { log "ERROR: $*"; exit 1; }

need_cmd() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1 || die "Missing required command: $1"; }
need_env() { [[ -n "${!1:-}" ]] || die "Missing required env var: $1"; }

is_ci() { [[ -n "${CI:-}" || -n "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" || -n "${GITLAB_CI:-}" || -n "${BUILD_BUILDID:-}" || -n "${JENKINS_URL:-}" ]]; }

usage() {
  cat >&2 <<'EOF'
Usage:
  deploy.sh --region REGION --app APP --env ENV --bucket S3_BUCKET [options]

Required:
  --region REGION
  --app APP
  --env ENV
  --bucket S3_BUCKET

Options:
  --profile AWS_PROFILE          (local only; ignored in CI unless explicitly set)
  --role-arn ROLE_ARN            Assume role before deploying (recommended for CI)
  --external-id EXTERNAL_ID      External ID for assume-role
  --session-name NAME            Role session name (default: deploy-APP-ENV)
  --stack-name STACK             CloudFormation stack name (default: APP-ENV)
  --template FILE                CloudFormation template file (default: template.yaml if exists else template.yml)
  --params FILE                  CloudFormation parameters JSON file (default: params/ENV.json if exists)
  --capabilities LIST            CloudFormation capabilities (default: CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM)
  --no-confirm                   Non-interactive (auto-approve). Default in CI.
  --dry-run                      Print planned actions, do not deploy
  --artifact FILE                Upload artifact to S3 (optional)
  --artifact-key KEY             S3 key for artifact (default: artifacts/APP/ENV/<basename>)
  --tags "k=v k=v"               Tags to apply to stack
  --help

Environment:
  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY[/AWS_SESSION_TOKEN] or AWS_PROFILE
  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION optional (overridden by --region)
EOF
}

REGION=""
APP=""
ENVNAME=""
BUCKET=""
PROFILE="${AWS_PROFILE:-}"
ROLE_ARN=""
EXTERNAL_ID=""
SESSION_NAME=""
STACK_NAME=""
TEMPLATE=""
PARAMS_FILE=""
CAPABILITIES="CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM"
NO_CONFIRM=""
DRY_RUN=""
ARTIFACT=""
ARTIFACT_KEY=""
TAGS=""

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case "$1" in
    --region) REGION="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --app) APP="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --env) ENVNAME="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --bucket) BUCKET="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --profile) PROFILE="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --role-arn) ROLE_ARN="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --external-id) EXTERNAL_ID="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --session-name) SESSION_NAME="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --stack-name) STACK_NAME="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --template) TEMPLATE="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --params) PARAMS_FILE="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --capabilities) CAPABILITIES="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --no-confirm) NO_CONFIRM="1"; shift ;;
    --dry-run) DRY_RUN="1"; shift ;;
    --artifact) ARTIFACT="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --artifact-key) ARTIFACT_KEY="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    --tags) TAGS="${2:-}"; shift 2 ;;
    -h|--help) usage; exit 0 ;;
    *) die "Unknown argument: $1" ;;
  esac
done

[[ -n "$REGION" && -n "$APP" && -n "$ENVNAME" && -n "$BUCKET" ]] || { usage; exit 2; }

need_cmd aws
need_cmd date

if [[ -z "$TEMPLATE" ]]; then
  if [[ -f "template.yaml" ]]; then TEMPLATE="template.yaml"
  elif [[ -f "template.yml" ]]; then TEMPLATE="template.yml"
  else die "Template not specified and no template.yaml/template.yml found"
  fi
fi

if [[ -z "$STACK_NAME" ]]; then STACK_NAME="${APP}-${ENVNAME}"; fi
if [[ -z "$SESSION_NAME" ]]; then SESSION_NAME="deploy-${APP}-${ENVNAME}"; fi

if [[ -z "$PARAMS_FILE" ]]; then
  if [[ -f "params/${ENVNAME}.json" ]]; then PARAMS_FILE="params/${ENVNAME}.json"; fi
fi

if is_ci && [[ -z "${NO_CONFIRM}" ]]; then NO_CONFIRM="1"; fi

AWS_ARGS=(--region "$REGION")
if [[ -n "$PROFILE" ]]; then
  AWS_ARGS+=(--profile "$PROFILE")
fi

cleanup_creds=0
unset_assumed_creds() {
  if [[ "${cleanup_creds:-0}" -eq 1 ]]; then
    unset AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY AWS_SESSION_TOKEN AWS_SECURITY_TOKEN AWS_CREDENTIAL_EXPIRATION
  fi
}
trap unset_assumed_creds EXIT

assume_role() {
  local role_arn="$1"
  local session_name="$2"
  local external_id="${3:-}"

  need_cmd jq

  local cmd=(aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" sts assume-role --role-arn "$role_arn" --role-session-name "$session_name" --duration-seconds 3600)
  if [[ -n "$external_id" ]]; then
    cmd+=(--external-id "$external_id")
  fi

  log "Assuming role: $role_arn"
  local out
  out="$("${cmd[@]}")" || die "AssumeRole failed"

  export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
  export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
  export AWS_SESSION_TOKEN
  export AWS_CREDENTIAL_EXPIRATION

  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID="$(jq -r '.Credentials.AccessKeyId' <<<"$out")"
  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY="$(jq -r '.Credentials.SecretAccessKey' <<<"$out")"
  AWS_SESSION_TOKEN="$(jq -r '.Credentials.SessionToken' <<<"$out")"
  AWS_CREDENTIAL_EXPIRATION="$(jq -r '.Credentials.Expiration' <<<"$out")"

  cleanup_creds=1

  AWS_ARGS=(--region "$REGION")
  log "Assumed role credentials set (expires: $AWS_CREDENTIAL_EXPIRATION)"
}

ensure_identity() {
  log "Validating AWS authentication"
  local ident
  if ! ident="$(aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" sts get-caller-identity --output json 2>/dev/null)"; then
    die "AWS authentication failed. Configure AWS credentials (AWS_PROFILE for local, or AWS_* env vars / role assumption for CI)."
  fi
  local arn
  arn="$(jq -r '.Arn // empty' <<<"$ident" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [[ -n "$arn" ]]; then
    log "Authenticated as: $arn"
  else
    log "Authenticated"
  fi
}

confirm() {
  local prompt="$1"
  if [[ -n "${NO_CONFIRM}" ]]; then
    return 0
  fi
  if ! [[ -t 0 ]]; then
    die "Refusing to prompt for confirmation in non-interactive mode. Use --no-confirm."
  fi
  read -r -p "$prompt [y/N] " ans
  [[ "$ans" == "y" || "$ans" == "Y" ]]
}

s3_upload_artifact() {
  local file="$1"
  local bucket="$2"
  local key="$3"

  [[ -f "$file" ]] || die "Artifact file not found: $file"

  log "Uploading artifact: $file -> s3://$bucket/$key"
  if [[ -n "${DRY_RUN}" ]]; then
    log "DRY RUN: aws s3 cp \"$file\" \"s3://$bucket/$key\""
    return 0
  fi
  aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" s3 cp "$file" "s3://${bucket}/${key}" --only-show-errors
}

deploy_stack() {
  local stack="$1"
  local template="$2"
  local params_file="$3"
  local caps="$4"
  local tags="$5"

  local cmd=(aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation deploy
    --stack-name "$stack"
    --template-file "$template"
    --capabilities $caps
    --no-fail-on-empty-changeset
  )

  if [[ -n "$params_file" ]]; then
    [[ -f "$params_file" ]] || die "Parameters file not found: $params_file"
    cmd+=(--parameter-overrides "file://${params_file}")
  fi

  if [[ -n "$tags" ]]; then
    cmd+=(--tags $tags)
  fi

  log "Deploying stack: $stack"
  if [[ -n "${DRY_RUN}" ]]; then
    printf '%q ' "${cmd[@]}" >&2
    printf '\n' >&2
    return 0
  fi

  "${cmd[@]}"
}

main() {
  if [[ -n "$ROLE_ARN" ]]; then
    assume_role "$ROLE_ARN" "$SESSION_NAME" "$EXTERNAL_ID"
  fi

  ensure_identity

  local artifact_s3_uri=""
  if [[ -n "$ARTIFACT" ]]; then
    if [[ -z "$ARTIFACT_KEY" ]]; then
      local base
      base="$(basename "$ARTIFACT")"
      ARTIFACT_KEY="artifacts/${APP}/${ENVNAME}/${base}"
    fi
    artifact_s3_uri="s3://${BUCKET}/${ARTIFACT_KEY}"
  fi

  log "Deployment plan:"
  log "  Region:     $REGION"
  log "  App:        $APP"
  log "  Env:        $ENVNAME"
  log "  Stack:      $STACK_NAME"
  log "  Template:   $TEMPLATE"
  log "  Params:     ${PARAMS_FILE:-<none>}"
  log "  Bucket:     $BUCKET"
  if [[ -n "$ARTIFACT" ]]; then
    log "  Artifact:   $ARTIFACT -> ${artifact_s3_uri}"
  fi
  if [[ -n "$ROLE_ARN" ]]; then
    log "  Role:       $ROLE_ARN"
  fi
  if [[ -n "$PROFILE" ]]; then
    log "  Profile:    $PROFILE"
  fi
  if [[ -n "$TAGS" ]]; then
    log "  Tags:       $TAGS"
  fi
  if [[ -n "${DRY_RUN}" ]]; then
    log "  Mode:       DRY RUN"
  fi

  confirm "Proceed with deployment?" || die "Aborted by user"

  if [[ -n "$ARTIFACT" ]]; then
    s3_upload_artifact "$ARTIFACT" "$BUCKET" "$ARTIFACT_KEY"
  fi

  deploy_stack "$STACK_NAME" "$TEMPLATE" "${PARAMS_FILE:-}" "$CAPABILITIES" "$TAGS"

  if [[ -n "${DRY_RUN}" ]]; then
    log "DRY RUN complete"
    return 0
  fi

  log "Fetching stack outputs"
  aws "${AWS_ARGS[@]}" cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" \
    --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs' --output table || true

  log "Deployment complete"
}

main "$@"
